features.name: Authentication & Department Selection
features.plain_english: This is where workers pick their department and enter a PIN to log in. Each department (Blow, Print, Rework) has its own PIN, and an admin master PIN can unlock everything.

features.name: Weigh Station
features.plain_english: This is the main screen where workers weigh rolls of material on a scale. The weight reading comes in live from a connected scale machine.

features.name: Dashboard
features.plain_english: This is a live summary screen showing production output, scrap rates, and quality breakdowns with charts — so supervisors can see how each department is performing.

features.name: Warehouse & Inventory
features.plain_english: This is where finished rolls are tracked in the warehouse. Workers can transfer rolls into inventory and see what stock is available.

features.name: Production History
features.plain_english: This is a log of all past weighing and production events, so supervisors can review what was produced and when.

features.name: Rework Inbox
features.plain_english: This is where defective or rejected rolls are queued for rework. The Rework department picks them up here and processes them.

features.name: Label Designer & QR Codes
features.plain_english: This is where roll labels with QR codes are designed and printed, so each roll can be scanned and identified throughout the factory.

features.name: Machine Settings
features.plain_english: This is where machines and production profiles are configured — things like machine number, product type, and target weights per department.

features.name: Scale Bridge (Hardware Connector)
features.plain_english: This is a small Windows background service that reads the physical weight scale over a serial (COM) port and streams the live weight value to the web app via WebSocket.

features.name: Database Schema
features.plain_english: This defines all the tables in the cloud database — rolls, products, customers, machine profiles, and production records.

external_services.name: Supabase
external_services.purpose: Cloud PostgreSQL database and real-time API — stores all production records, roll data, machine profiles, and inventory
